name: Sales Outreach Engine
description: A four-agent pipeline that discovers ICP-matched prospects, enriches each company with recent signals, drafts personalized outreach, and verifies every claim before approval.

agents.name: scout
agents.description: Lead Finder — searches for companies that match the target ICP (industry, size, tech stack, growth signals) and surfaces a qualified prospect list.
agents.heartbeat_description: ICP prospect scan — weekday mornings at 8:00 AM

agents.name: analyst
agents.description: Company Enricher — researches each prospect for recent news, funding rounds, hiring signals, leadership changes, and product launches to surface personalization hooks.
agents.heartbeat_description: On-demand only, triggered by scout prospect list
agents.output_format: Company Profile → Recent Signals → Personalization Hooks → Recommended Angle

agents.name: writer
agents.description: Outreach Drafter — writes personalized cold emails that reference specific company details from the analyst's enrichment. Never invents details.
agents.heartbeat_description: On-demand only, triggered by analyst enrichment
agents.output_format: Subject Line → Email Body → Personalization Source Note → Follow-up Sequence → Approval Ask

agents.name: critic
agents.description: Outreach Reviewer — verifies that every claim in the email is grounded in the analyst's research, checks tone, and blocks anything that fabricates details about the prospect.
agents.heartbeat_description: Continuous — processes review queue as outreach drafts arrive

scout.description: ICP prospect scan — weekday mornings at 8:00 AM

team_display.short_description: Finds prospects and drafts personalized outreach

review_page.context_description: Company signals and enrichment data used to personalise this outreach

quality_dimensions.label: Personalization
quality_dimensions.description: Does the email reference specific, accurate details about the prospect?

quality_dimensions.label: Tone
quality_dimensions.description: Is the tone appropriate for cold outreach to this prospect?

quality_dimensions.label: Value Prop Clarity
quality_dimensions.description: Is the value proposition clear and compelling?

quality_dimensions.label: Accuracy
quality_dimensions.description: Are all claims about the prospect grounded in research?

builder.suggested_topics_placeholder: e.g., B2B SaaS, fintech Series A companies, e-commerce brands
